expectations.text: Review does NOT include a complexity/split advisory
Review does not flag breaking changes
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies UmbBlockElementManager.hints→view as internal-only, not a breaking change
Verdict is 'Request Changes' — found Critical bug where root tab view context is never created, so Generic tab badges never work in routed mode. This is a genuine functional gap in the changed code.

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All findings are functional: missing view context (Critical), route asymmetry, observer race condition, optional chain guard. No grammar, typo, or style flags.
